name: Mistral Model Family
description: Planning profile for Mistral-style open and hosted deployments where application guardrails and tool configuration drive many security outcomes.

risk_sensitivities.rationale: Application prompt isolation and guardrails determine whether untrusted content changes behavior.
Long-context and self-hosted variants should be tested for source labeling and policy drift.

evaluation_notes: Capture deployment mode, guardrail layer, and tool exposure.
Use baseline and mutated variants to detect configuration-specific differences.
